title: Resolution Authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) Through the Honorable Mayor Anthony F. Genuino to Enter and Sign Into a Memorandum of Agreement MOA) with Trace College Inc., - Los Baños for the Work Immersion of Grade 12 Students Professional Training Program, Worl-immersion, and On-the-job Training.
